title: kaleidoscope Painting Extension
description: This mod adds player paintings to the Kaleidoscope Tavern.
body:
Ever wanted to own a custom painting of your own skin in the game?
This mod adds more player-created paintings for Kaleidoscope Tavern.
You may submit your skin and username to the author.
The mod will be updated once every 10 submissions, adding everyone’s artwork to the game.
